title: I'm Fast
description: A mod to remove minecraft moved too quickly! and moved wrongly (speed limits)
body:
This mod it's a modern solution to remove minecraft "moved too quickly" and "moved wrongly" using mixin

 

This mod allows you to move faster beyond the limits of vanilla

This mod is server side is not required in the client

 

if you want a port for a version/loader just open a github issue with the port label

 

just copy and paste into the server mods folder and it's done
